name: Cheesecake Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw lemonade.
2. Mix cake ingredients with an electric mixer until moistened.
3. Beat at high speed for 4 minutes.
4. Pour into a greased and floured bundt pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 50-60 minutes.
6. When cool, drizzle the glaze over top.
- Make the glaze by mixing all the glaze ingredients and beating until smooth.
